name: Accessible Contact Form Fix
description: Fix accessibility issues in a contact form (frontend quality rubric: a11y). index.html form id contact-form has unlabeled inputs and poor semantics. Requirements: (1) every input/select/textarea must have an associated <label for="..."> matching id; (2) required fields email and message must use required attribute and aria-required="true"; (3) error region id form-error with role="alert" and aria-live="polite" (hidden until error); (4) submit button type="submit" id form-submit; (5) on submit, if email empty or invalid, prevent default and show error text in #form-error; (6) focus styles visible (outline or box-shadow on :focus-visible). Keep field ids name, email, message. FINISHED when fixed.
source: Inspired by frontend a11y review checklists & form interaction benchmarks.
